    Method
    Description
    static DurableConfig.Builder
    DurableConfig.builder()
    Creates a new builder for DurableConfig.
    DurableConfig.Builder
    DurableConfig.Builder.withCheckpointDelay(Duration duration)
    Sets how often the SDK checkpoints updates to backend.
    DurableConfig.Builder
    DurableConfig.Builder.withDurableExecutionClient(DurableExecutionClient durableExecutionClient)
    Sets a custom DurableExecutionClient.
    DurableConfig.Builder
    DurableConfig.Builder.withExecutorService(ExecutorService executorService)
    Sets a custom ExecutorService for running user-defined operations.
    DurableConfig.Builder

    Sets a custom LambdaClient for production use.
    DurableConfig.Builder
    DurableConfig.Builder.withLoggerConfig(LoggerConfig loggerConfig)
    Sets a custom LoggerConfig.
    DurableConfig.Builder
    DurableConfig.Builder.withPollingStrategy(PollingStrategy pollingStrategy)
    Sets the polling strategy.
    DurableConfig.Builder
    DurableConfig.Builder.withSerDes(SerDes serDes)
    Sets a custom SerDes implementation.
